label: South Street
description: The stretch of South St south of the Green — walkable, BYOB-heavy, where locals actually eat on weeknights.

label: The Green
description: Morristown's central square and the blocks surrounding Park Place — civic, lively, a mix of casual and upscale.

label: Speedwell Ave
description: The Speedwell corridor — diverse, underrated, where you'll find some of the best independent cooking in town.

label: Washington Street
description: Washington St runs parallel to the Green — bars, late-night options, and a few long-standing neighborhood spots.

label: Morris Street
description: Morris St connects Washington to the train station — a mix of dining, a few late-night spots, and neighborhood staples.

label: HQ Plaza
description: The Headquarters Plaza complex on Speedwell — a cluster of restaurants in the heart of the downtown office district.
